verification_notes: Cross-checked with lunar-python engine: 1983-02-05 00:00 (CST) => 癸亥年 甲寅月 甲子日 甲子时.
This timestamp is widely used as a stable calibration point because day pillar is 甲子日.
If you prefer strict school-specific rules for LiChun/solar-term boundaries, keep this as baseline and calibrate against your target 万年历 source.
